name: P-2 each agent dataset jsonl entry declares id input and expected fields per the architecture eval schema
command: node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const path=require("path");const dir=process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+"/evals/datasets/agents";for(const f of fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(n=>n.endsWith(".jsonl"))){for(const l of fs.readFileSync(path.join(dir,f),"utf8").split("\n").filter(Boolean)){const j=JSON.parse(l);if(!j.id||j.input===undefined||j.expected===undefined)process.exit(1);}}process.exit(0)' && echo ok 1>&2
